summary: Customer Account Unification Pack testing complete. All backend APIs (12/12 tests passed) and frontend features working correctly. Unified marketplace at /account/marketplace has Products tab (41 products, compact cards with Add button) and Services tab (4 service templates with detail showcase and quote request form). Cart button in topbar shows badge counter. Cart drawer opens on add, shows items with checkout flow. Service quote form submits to POST /api/service-requests-quick successfully. Dashboard hero CTAs correctly link to marketplace tabs.
critical_code_review_comments: MarketplaceUnifiedPageV3.jsx correctly implements tab switching with URL params sync
ProductCardCompact.jsx properly uses CartDrawerContext for add-to-cart functionality
ServiceQuoteRequestFormV2.jsx has proper form validation and submits to /api/service-requests-quick
CartTopbarButton.jsx correctly calculates total quantity from cart items
CartDrawerV2.jsx integrates with CheckoutPanel for checkout flow
CustomerPortalLayoutV2.jsx sidebar correctly shows only: Dashboard, Marketplace, My Orders, Quotes, Invoices, Recurring Plans, Referrals, Statement, Help - Cart/Services/Sales Assist removed
CustomerDashboardV3.jsx hero CTAs correctly link to /account/marketplace and /account/marketplace?tab=services
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer Account Unification Pack fully tested. Unified marketplace at /account/marketplace with Products (default) and Services tabs. Products tab shows 41 products in compact card grid with Add button. Services tab shows 4 service templates (garment-printing, office-branding, general). Clicking service opens ServiceDetailShowcase with ServiceQuoteRequestFormV2. Form submits to POST /api/service-requests-quick (allows guest submissions). Cart button in topbar shows badge count. CartDrawerV2 opens as side panel with checkout flow. Dashboard hero has 'Browse Products' and 'Request Service' CTAs linking to correct marketplace tabs.

Backend API Tests.test_product_has_required_fields: PASS - id, name, price fields present
